breakdown: This PR adds XP progress tracking visibility to the rewards box by adding condition `(current_xp > 0 and next_level_xp > 0)` to the visibility check. The code change is minimal and targeted, with updated docstrings explaining the new behavior. Tests were refactored to use `session_header_utils` instead of `world_logic_module`, and documentation comments were updated to reference the new function name `_check_and_set_level_up_pending`. However, no new tests specifically validate the XP progress tracking feature, and the error handling remains unchanged as this is a simple logic addition.
key_changes: Added XP progress tracking condition `(current_xp > 0 and next_level_xp > 0)` to rewards box visibility check in `normalize_rewards_box_for_ui`
Updated docstring to document new visibility logic for XP progress tracking
Removed `world_logic_module` fixture parameter from multiple test functions
Updated documentation comments to reference new function name `_check_and_set_level_up_pending` instead of `ensure_level_up_rewards_pending`
